candidates.reason: Email was found on a supporting/directory source but could not be reliably matched to the target registry clinic. Needs review due to low confidence or conflicting target evidence. Triage llm-v1: not_supported_by_evidence (0.93).

triage.reason: LLM classification retained for reviewer context but did not meet the auto-application threshold. The evidence shows the email on a generic "Háziorvos" page and says it is used for prescriptions/referrals, but it does not explicitly tie the email to "Dr. Domány Eszter", "Domány-Barki Kft.", or the target practice label/address. A shared page is not enough to assign ownership to this clinic.
